title: Iterators, Generators, and Lazy Pipelines · Behavior Case: Python Generator Functions
summary: Stream large activity exports through bounded-memory validation and aggregation stages. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python generator functions increment in a lazy activity-processing pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write generator functions with yield, local suspended state, return behavior, and cleanup-aware consumption.
Distinguish iterable, iterator, iter, next, StopIteration, restartability, and one-pass consumption.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
